features.description: Background and agent-view sessions now honor shell-exported ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL instead of leaking API keys to the defaul
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed background and agent-view sessions dropping a shell-exported `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`, which sent API keys to the default endpoint and failed with 401

features.description: Worktree-isolated subagents no longer escape isolation by running shell commands in the parent checkout.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed worktree-isolated subagents sometimes running shell commands in the parent checkout instead of their own worktree

features.description: Subagents are now less likely to re-delegate their entire task to another subagent, changing orchestration behavior.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved subagent behavior: agents are now less likely to re-delegate their entire task to another subagent

features.description: Startup 'claude command missing or broken' warnings moved from launch to /doctor and /status output.
features.reference_changelog_line: Removed the startup "claude command missing or broken" warnings — they now appear in `/doctor` and `/status` instead

features.description: MCP roots/list now includes session additional working directories and emits notifications/roots/list_changed on set cha
features.reference_changelog_line: Added the session's additional working directories to MCP `roots/list`, with `notifications/roots/list_changed` sent when the set changes
